title: dimorphotheca fruticosa
intro: Dimorphotheca fruticosa, also known as the Cape marigold or African daisy, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, characterized by its bright orange and yellow daisy-like flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dimorphotheca fruticosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and protect against infection, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
